content: Audit logging pattern with Drizzle+Postgres: write a Drizzle audit_logs table (id uuid, userId, action, resource, resourceId, metadata jsonb, ipAddress, userAgent, createdAt). Application-level writes preferred over triggers for SaaS because (a) IP/userId is available in app context but not DB context, (b) Drizzle lacks native trigger DDL support, (c) trigger-based approaches via Bemi or pg-notify add operational complexity. Fire-and-forget async inserts from route handlers. Index on (userId, createdAt DESC) and (resource, createdAt DESC). No PII in metadata. Store rawIP masked or hashed if GDPR applies.
